Rooms & suites

Restful spaces after island days

Choose a calm, warm base for slow mornings, shared plans, and easy returns after Newcoast discoveries.

Stay options

Rooms designed around comfort, connection, and calm.

Best for couples

Seaside Deluxe Room

Soft textures, warm daylight, and functional space for two guests who want an easy island base.

  • 2 guests
  • King or twin
  • Breakfast option

Family favorite

Family Connection Room

More room to spread out, practical storage, and family-friendly planning for parents and children.

  • 4 guests
  • Connecting option
  • Kid-friendly
Book this room

Premium stay

Newcoast Suite

An elevated suite for longer stays, slower mornings, and travelers who want a little more breathing room.

  • 3 guests
  • Living area
  • Premium amenities

Room comforts

Everything should feel easy before the adventure begins.

Use room content to make the decision low-friction: sleeping setup, occupancy, breakfast, family notes, view type, and cancellation policy should stay visible before the guest clicks book.

  • Clear occupancy and bed setup
  • Family and group-friendly room notes
  • Visible booking CTA on every room card
  • Accessible image descriptions and readable copy

Ready when you are

Plan a stay that gives you space to rest, connect, and discover.

Choose your dates, tell us who is coming, and let the island rhythm shape the rest.
